name: agent-loop
description: Self-evolving autonomous loops: AI-first, completely autonomous, token-optimized, self-evolving + journaling. One tick primitive (state + new data -> action + new state + one record); four work-type profiles (research / experiment / build / maintenance).

interface.longDescription: Give a one-line goal; it spawns a loop that observes, acts, verifies, journals, fires its own next tick, and re-evolves its directive — AI-first, token-light, self-evolving. Native on Claude Code; driveable here via the bundled skills + .loop/loop.py.
defaultPrompt: Spawn an agent-loop for this goal.
